---
title: "Untitled"
author: "qinhaifeng"
date: "2025-12-25"
output: word_document
---

```{r}
library(rtracklayer)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(depmixS4)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

# ==========================================
# 1. 高效读取与 Binning (已修复版)
# ==========================================

# 定义感兴趣的区域 (chr22 全长)
chrom_name <- "chr22"
seq_len_chr22 <- 50818468 
gr_chr22 <- GRanges(seqnames = chrom_name, ranges = IRanges(1, seq_len_chr22))

# 设定 Bin size
bin_size <- 200

# 生成 Bins
bins <- tileGenome(seqlengths = setNames(seq_len_chr22, chrom_name), 
                   tilewidth = bin_size, 
                   cut.last.tile.in.chrom = TRUE)

# 👇👇👇 这里是修改过的新函数 👇👇👇
get_binned_signal <- function(bw_file, bins) {
  message(paste("Processing:", bw_file))
  
  # 1. 导入 BigWig
  bw_gr <- import.bw(bw_file, selection = BigWigSelection(bins))
  
  # 2. 计算 Coverage
  score_rle_list <- tryCatch({
    coverage(bw_gr, weight = "score")
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error in coverage calculation for", bw_file))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(score_rle_list)) return(NULL)
  
  # ⭐ 关键修复在这里 ⭐
  # 强行让 score_rle_list 只保留 bins 里有的染色体 (即只保留 chr22)
  score_rle_list <- score_rle_list[seqlevels(bins)]
  
  # 3. 计算每个 bin 的平均信号
  binned_scores <- binnedAverage(bins, score_rle_list, "score")
  
  return(binned_scores$score)
}
# 👆👆👆 修改结束 👆👆👆

bw_files <- list(
  "H3K4me3"  = "data/H3K4me3.BigWig", 
  "H3K27ac"  = "data/H3K27ac.BigWig",
  "H3K36me3" = "data/H3K36me3.BigWig"
)

# 批量处理 (现在运行这一行应该几秒钟就搞定)
signal_list <- lapply(bw_files, get_binned_signal, bins = bins)

# 拼接矩阵
X_raw <- do.call(cbind, signal_list)

# ==========================================
# 2. 统计预处理 (Log + Z-score)
# ==========================================

# ⭐ Method 描述重点：
# 1. Log1p transformation to stabilize variance (stabilizing extreme peaks).
# 2. Z-score standardization so all tracks contribute equally to the multivariate Gaussian.

X_log <- log1p(X_raw) # log(x+1) 避免 0 值报错
X <- scale(X_log)     # Z-score

# 检查数据 (N_bins x 3)
head(X)
dim(X)

# ==========================================
# 3. HMM 模型训练 (Multivariate Gaussian)
# ==========================================

# 准备数据框
df_hmm <- as.data.frame(X)
colnames(df_hmm) <- c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")

# 设定状态数 (K=4: Promoter, Enhancer, Transcribed, Background)
K <- 4

# ⭐ depmixS4 多元高斯标准写法：
# family 需要是一个 list，对应每一列数据
# 这种写法隐含假设：在给定状态 k 下，三个标记的信号是独立的 (Diagonal Covariance)
# 也就是 P(X|Z) = P(H3K4me3|Z) * P(H3K27ac|Z) * P(H3K36me3|Z)
mod <- depmix(
  list(H3K4me3 ~ 1, H3K27ac ~ 1, H3K36me3 ~ 1), 
  data = df_hmm, 
  nstates = K, 
  family = list(gaussian(), gaussian(), gaussian()) 
)

message("Fitting HMM... (This may take a few minutes)")
# 使用 EM 算法 (Baum-Welch)
fit_mod <- fit(mod)

# 输出模型收敛信息
summary(fit_mod)

# ==========================================
# 4. 解码与结果提取
# ==========================================

# Viterbi 解码得到状态序列
# posterior() 函数会返回状态概率和 Viterbi 路径
post_probs <- posterior(fit_mod)
state_labels <- post_probs$state

# 将状态结果贴回 GRanges 对象，方便后续操作
mcols(bins) <- cbind(mcols(bins), as.data.frame(X), state = factor(state_labels))


```




```{r}
# ==========================================
# 5. 高级可视化 (论文级图表)
# ==========================================

# (1) 状态发射矩阵热图 (Emission Parameters)
# 我们需要提取每个状态下，每个 mark 的 Mean
params <- getpars(fit_mod)
# depmix 的参数提取比较乱，手动聚合一下均值更稳：
state_means <- aggregate(df_hmm, by=list(State=state_labels), FUN=mean)
rownames(state_means) <- state_means$State
state_means_mat <- as.matrix(state_means[,-1])

# 画 Heatmap
pdf("Figure_EmissionHeatmap.pdf", width = 6, height = 10)
par(mar = c(6, 6, 5, 2))  # 下 左 上 右，保证不裁剪
heatmap(state_means_mat, Rowv = NA, Colv = NA, scale="none", 
        main="Emission Matrix (Z-score Means)", 
        col=colorRampPalette(c("white", "red"))(50))
dev.off()





# ===== 先算每个 state 的活性（用三条 mark 的均值和）=====
state_means_df <- aggregate(df_hmm, by = list(State = state_labels), FUN = mean)
state_means_df$activity <- rowSums(state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")])

# 活性从低到高的 state 顺序（例如：2,4,1,3）
state_order_low_to_high <- state_means_df$State[order(state_means_df$activity)]

# ===== 颜色从低到高：白 灰 粉 红（你想要的）=====
palette_low_to_high <- c("lightgray", "pink", "red", "darkred")

# 关键：names 必须和数据里的 state 值完全一致
state_colors <- setNames(
  palette_low_to_high,
  paste0("State ", state_order_low_to_high)
)

# ===== 关键修复：把 bins 里的 state 改成 "State 1" 这种格式 =====
mcols(bins)$state <- factor(
  paste0("State ", state_labels),
  levels = names(state_colors)   # 保证图例顺序就是你定义的颜色顺序
)

# (2) 基因组轨迹可视化 (Gviz 包是画图神器，如果没有就用 ggplot)
# 这里用 ggplot 手写一个简单的 Track 图
subset_idx <- 10000:10500 # 选一段有趣的区域 (100kb 左右)
subset_data <- as.data.frame(mcols(bins)[subset_idx, ])
subset_data$pos <- start(bins)[subset_idx]

# 长宽转换以便画图
melted_data <- melt(
  subset_data,
  id.vars = c("pos", "state"),
  measure.vars = c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")
)
state_levels <- names(state_colors)

# 只用于“撑开图例”的 dummy 数据：每个 state 给一条记录
legend_dummy <- data.frame(
  pos   = min(subset_data$pos),
  y     = -2,
  state = factor(state_levels, levels = state_levels)
)

pdf("segmentation_silence.pdf", width = 10, height = 8) 
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data=melted_data, aes(x=pos, y=value, color=variable), alpha=0.8) +
  geom_tile(data=subset_data, aes(x=pos, y=-2, fill=state), height=0.5) +

  # ✅ 关键：加一个透明图层，只为了让图例包含所有 state
  geom_tile(
    data = legend_dummy,
    aes(x = pos, y = y, fill = state),
    height = 0.5,
    alpha = 0,                 # 不显示在图上
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = state_colors,
    limits = state_levels,
    breaks = state_levels,
    drop   = FALSE,
    name   = "HMM State"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1))) +  # 图例里强制不透明
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title="Chromatin State Segmentation (chr22 subset)",
       y="Normalized Signal (Z-score)", x="Genomic Position")
dev.off()




# ==========================================
# 自动寻找"最好看"的区域 (High Signal Region)
# ==========================================

# 1) 找到 H3K4me3 峰值 bin
max_idx <- which.max(mcols(bins)$H3K4me3)

# 2) 以峰值为中心 ±100 bins
plot_start <- max(1, max_idx - 100)
plot_end   <- min(length(bins), max_idx + 100)
subset_idx <- plot_start:plot_end

# 3) 准备绘图数据
subset_data <- as.data.frame(mcols(bins)[subset_idx, ])
subset_data$pos <- start(bins)[subset_idx]

melted_data <- melt(
  subset_data,
  id.vars = c("pos", "state"),
  measure.vars = c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")
)

# ==========================================
# ✅ 关键：统一 state 的 levels & 颜色（用你刚刚那套 state_colors）
# ==========================================

# 如果你前面已经算过 state_colors，就直接用；
# 否则请确保 state_colors 已在环境里，且 names(state_colors) 是 "State 4" 这种格式

state_levels <- names(state_colors)

# 确保这一段数据里的 state 也是 "State X" 形式，并按你定义的顺序做 factor
subset_data$state <- factor(as.character(subset_data$state), levels = state_levels)

# 只用于“撑开图例”的 dummy 数据：每个 state 给一条记录（不影响画面）
legend_dummy <- data.frame(
  pos   = min(subset_data$pos),
  y     = min(melted_data$value, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.5,
  state = factor(state_levels, levels = state_levels)
)

# 画图
pdf("segmentation_active.pdf", width = 10, height = 8) 
ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = melted_data,
    aes(x = pos, y = value, color = variable),
    size = 0.8, alpha = 0.9
  ) +

  # 状态条带
  geom_tile(
    data = subset_data,
    aes(x = pos, y = min(melted_data$value, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.5, fill = state),
    height = 0.5
  ) +

  # ✅ 透明图层：强制图例显示所有 state 的色块
  geom_tile(
    data = legend_dummy,
    aes(x = pos, y = y, fill = state),
    height = 0.5,
    alpha = 0,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = state_colors,
    limits = state_levels,
    breaks = state_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    name = "HMM State"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1))) +

  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = paste("Chromatin State Segmentation (Active Region around bin", max_idx, ")"),
    y = "Normalized Signal (Z-score)",
    x = "Genomic Position"
  )
dev.off()
# ==========================================
# 6. (可选) 保存结果用于 enrichment 分析
# ==========================================
# 导出为 BED 文件，可以直接上传到 UCSC Genome Browser 查看
export.bed(bins, "K562_HMM_Segmentation.bed")


```

```{r}
# ==========================================
# 7. (强力修复版) 最终验证：计算状态与已知注释的富集度
# ==========================================
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(GenomeInfoDb)
library(ggplot2) # 用 ggplot2 画更漂亮的图

# 1. 获取 Promoter 并进行严格清洗
message("正在获取 Promoter 数据...")
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
promoters_gr <- promoters(txdb, upstream=2000, downstream=2000)

# 强制统一命名风格为 UCSC (即 "chr1", "chr22"...)
seqlevelsStyle(promoters_gr) <- "UCSC" 
# 只保留 chr22，并修剪越界坐标
promoters_gr <- keepSeqlevels(promoters_gr, "chr22", pruning.mode="coarse")
promoters_gr <- trim(promoters_gr)

# 2. 准备 HMM 结果 (bins)
bins_gr <- bins # 复制一份，避免修改原数据
mcols(bins_gr)$state <- factor(state_labels)
seqlevelsStyle(bins_gr) <- "UCSC" # 强制 bins 也用 UCSC 风格

# --- 🔍 诊断信息 (运行后请查看控制台输出) ---
message("---------------- DIAGNOSTICS ----------------")
message(paste("Promoter 数量 (chr22):", length(promoters_gr)))
message(paste("Bins 数量 (chr22):", length(bins_gr)))
# 检查是否真的有重叠 (只检查 State 1)
test_overlap <- intersect(bins_gr[bins_gr$state == 1], promoters_gr, ignore.strand=TRUE)
message(paste("测试 State 1 与 Promoter 的重叠碱基数:", sum(width(test_overlap))))
if(sum(width(test_overlap)) == 0) {
  warning("⚠️ 警告：重叠数仍为 0！请检查数据源是否对应 hg38。")
} else {
  message("✅ 成功检测到重叠！可以绘图。")
}
message("---------------------------------------------")

# 3. 定义计算函数 (增加 ignore.strand=TRUE)
calc_enrichment <- function(state_k, bins_gr, feature_gr) {
  # 找出属于 State k 的所有 bins
  state_bins <- bins_gr[bins_gr$state == state_k]
  len_state <- sum(width(state_bins))
  if (len_state == 0) return(0)
  
  # ⭐ 关键修改：加上 ignore.strand=TRUE，防止因正负链导致的计算漏失
  overlap <- intersect(state_bins, feature_gr, ignore.strand=TRUE)
  len_overlap <- sum(width(overlap))
  
  # 背景概率 calculation
  total_genome_len <- seqlengths(bins_gr)["chr22"]
  # reduce 合并重叠的 promoter 区域，避免重复计算
  feature_total_len <- sum(width(reduce(feature_gr, ignore.strand=TRUE)))
  
  background_prob <- feature_total_len / total_genome_len
  observed_prob <- len_overlap / len_state
  
  return(observed_prob / background_prob)
}

# 循环计算
enrichment_scores <- sapply(1:4, calc_enrichment, bins_gr=bins_gr, feature_gr=promoters_gr)

# 打印结果数值
print(enrichment_scores)

# 4. 使用 ggplot2 绘图 (Publication Quality)
df_plot <- data.frame(
  State = factor(paste("State", 1:4), levels = paste("State", 1:4)),
  Enrichment = enrichment_scores
)

# ===== 根据 Z-score means 排序并分配颜色（低->高：白 灰 粉 红）=====
state_means_df <- aggregate(df_hmm, by = list(State = state_labels), FUN = mean)
state_means_df$activity <- rowSums(state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")])
state_order_low_to_high <- state_means_df$State[order(state_means_df$activity)]

palette_low_to_high <- c("white", "lightgray", "pink", "red")

# 关键修复：名字必须是 "State 1" 这种格式，才能匹配 fill 的值
state_colors <- setNames(palette_low_to_high, paste("State", state_order_low_to_high))

pdf("TSS_enrich_validation.pdf", width = 10, height = 8) 
ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = State, y = Enrichment, fill = State)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.7) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = state_colors) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.5, y = 2, label = "Random (Fold=1)", color = "blue") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Functional Validation: Enrichment at TSS",
       y = "Fold Enrichment", x = "HMM States") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
dev.off()

```





```{r}
# ==========================================
# 8. (防弹版) 绝杀验证：计算与 CpG Islands 的富集度
# ==========================================
library(GenomicRanges)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. 直接从 UCSC GoldenPath 下载 CpG 数据 (绕过 API 错误)
message("正在直接下载 CpG Islands 数据 (防弹模式)...")
url <- "http://hgdownload.cse.ucsc.edu/goldenpath/hg38/database/cpgIslandExt.txt.gz"
temp_file <- tempfile()
# 下载文件 (几秒钟)
download.file(url, temp_file, quiet = TRUE)

# 2. 读取并转换为 GRanges
# cpgIslandExt 文件的格式：第2列=chrom, 第3列=start, 第4列=end
cpg_df <- read.table(temp_file, sep="\t", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
cpg_gr <- GRanges(
  seqnames = cpg_df[, 2], 
  ranges = IRanges(start = cpg_df[, 3], end = cpg_df[, 4])
)

# 3. 清洗数据 (只保留 chr22)
# 统一命名风格
seqlevelsStyle(cpg_gr) <- "UCSC" 
# 只保留 chr22，并修剪越界坐标
cpg_gr <- keepSeqlevels(cpg_gr, "chr22", pruning.mode="coarse")
cpg_gr <- trim(cpg_gr)

# 4. 复用之前的计算函数
# 确保 calc_enrichment 函数已经在内存中，以下是之前定义的函数
calc_enrichment <- function(state_k, bins_gr, feature_gr) {
  # 找出属于 State k 的所有 bins
  state_bins <- bins_gr[bins_gr$state == state_k]
  len_state <- sum(width(state_bins))
  if (len_state == 0) return(0)
  
  # 加上 ignore.strand=TRUE，防止因正负链导致的计算漏失
  overlap <- intersect(state_bins, feature_gr, ignore.strand=TRUE)
  len_overlap <- sum(width(overlap))
  
  # 背景概率 calculation
  total_genome_len <- seqlengths(bins_gr)["chr22"]
  # 合并重叠的 CpG 区域，避免重复计算
  feature_total_len <- sum(width(reduce(feature_gr, ignore.strand=TRUE)))
  
  background_prob <- feature_total_len / total_genome_len
  observed_prob <- len_overlap / len_state
  
  return(observed_prob / background_prob)
}

# 计算 CpG 富集度
enrichment_cpg <- sapply(1:4, calc_enrichment, bins_gr=bins_gr, feature_gr=cpg_gr)

# 打印数值 (State 1 应该非常高)
print(enrichment_cpg)

# 5. 绘图 (Figure 4)
df_cpg <- data.frame(
  State = factor(paste("State", 1:4), levels = paste("State", 1:4)),
  Enrichment = enrichment_cpg
)



pdf("CpG_Islands_validation.pdf", width = 10, height = 8) 
ggplot(df_cpg, aes(x = State, y = Enrichment, fill = State)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.7) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = state_colors) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", size = 1) +
  
  # 添加标注
  annotate("text", x = 3.5, y = 2, label = "Random (Fold=1)", color = "blue") +
  
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Validation against CpG Islands",
       y = "Fold Enrichment", x = "HMM States") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black")
  )
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# ==========================================
# 10. Gene body enrichment（沿用 calc_enrichment 风格）
# ==========================================
library(GenomicFeatures)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(GenomeInfoDb)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(ggplot2)

# ---------- (0) 确保 bins_gr 和 calc_enrichment 已经存在 ----------
# bins_gr: 你的 bins（chr22）+ mcols(state)
# calc_enrichment: 你之前定义的函数

# ---------- (1) 构建 chr22 gene bodies ----------
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

message("正在获取 gene bodies (hg38 knownGene)...")

# genes() 给出每个 gene 的整体范围（包含 intron/exon 的 union 范围）
genes_gr <- genes(txdb)

# 统一成 UCSC 风格并只保留 chr22
seqlevelsStyle(genes_gr) <- "UCSC"
genes_gr <- keepSeqlevels(genes_gr, "chr22", pruning.mode = "coarse")
genes_gr <- trim(genes_gr)

# 可选：去掉 promoter 区域（TSS ± 2kb），避免 gene body enrichment 被 promoter 影响
message("正在构建 promoter 并从 gene body 中剔除 (TSS±2kb)...")
promoters_gr2 <- promoters(txdb, upstream = 2000, downstream = 2000)
seqlevelsStyle(promoters_gr2) <- "UCSC"
promoters_gr2 <- keepSeqlevels(promoters_gr2, "chr22", pruning.mode="coarse")
promoters_gr2 <- trim(promoters_gr2)

# gene_body_noProm = genes - promoters
# 注意 setdiff 可能产生很多碎片区间，所以最后 reduce
gene_body_gr <- suppressWarnings(setdiff(genes_gr, promoters_gr2, ignore.strand = TRUE))
gene_body_gr <- reduce(gene_body_gr, ignore.strand = TRUE)

message(paste("chr22 genes ranges:", length(genes_gr)))
message(paste("chr22 promoter ranges:", length(promoters_gr2)))
message(paste("chr22 gene-body(no promoter) ranges after reduce:", length(gene_body_gr)))
message(paste("Total gene-body length (bp):", sum(width(gene_body_gr))))

# ---------- (2) 计算各状态对 gene body 的 fold enrichment ----------
enrichment_gene_body <- sapply(1:4, calc_enrichment, bins_gr = bins_gr, feature_gr = gene_body_gr)

print(enrichment_gene_body)

df_gene_body <- data.frame(
  State = factor(paste("State", 1:4), levels = paste("State", 1:4)),
  GeneBody_Enrichment = enrichment_gene_body
)

# ---------- (3) 画图（Publication style，与你前两张一致） ----------
pdf("gene_bady_validation.pdf", width = 10, height = 8) 
ggplot(df_gene_body, aes(x = State, y = GeneBody_Enrichment, fill = State)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = state_colors) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.5, y = max(df_gene_body$GeneBody_Enrichment) * 0.9,
           label = "Random (Fold=1)", color = "blue") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Validation: Enrichment in Gene Bodies (excluding TSS±2kb)",
       y = "Fold Enrichment", x = "HMM States") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
dev.off()
```








```{r}
# ==========================================
# 9. (更新版) 模型“体检”诊断 + 汇总到 CSV
#   新增：Gene body enrichment
# ==========================================

message("=== Diagnostic & Summary (Updated) ===")

# ---------- 1) 富集度数值对比：TSS / CpG / GeneBody ----------
message("\n--- 1. Enrichment comparison: TSS vs CpG vs GeneBody ---")

enrichment_comparison <- data.frame(
  State = paste("State", 1:4),
  TSS_Enrichment      = round(enrichment_scores, 2),
  CpG_Enrichment      = round(enrichment_cpg, 2),
  GeneBody_Enrichment = round(enrichment_gene_body, 2)
)
print(enrichment_comparison)

# ---------- 2) CpG 数据检查（保留你原来的） ----------
message("\n--- 2. CpG data sanity check ---")
message(paste("chr22 CpG islands count:", length(cpg_gr)))

# ---------- 3) 状态覆盖率（Genomic coverage） ----------
message("\n--- 3. State genomic coverage ---")
state_counts <- table(state_labels)

# 强制按 1:4 顺序对齐（防止某个 state 恰好没出现导致错位）
state_counts <- state_counts[as.character(1:4)]
state_counts[is.na(state_counts)] <- 0

state_pct <- round(as.numeric(state_counts) / sum(state_counts) * 100, 1)

coverage_results <- data.frame(
  State   = paste("State", 1:4),
  Count   = as.numeric(state_counts),
  Percent = state_pct
)
print(coverage_results)

# ---------- 4) 状态定义：每个 state 的观测均值（Emission means from data） ----------
message("\n--- 4. Emission means (computed from data) ---")

state_means_df <- aggregate(df_hmm, by = list(State = state_labels), FUN = mean)

# 防止某个 state 缺失：补齐 State 1..4
state_means_df$State <- as.character(state_means_df$State)
all_states <- data.frame(State = as.character(1:4))
state_means_df <- merge(all_states, state_means_df, by = "State", all.x = TRUE)

# 保留2位小数
state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")] <- round(
  state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")],
  2
)

# 统一列名与 State 格式
colnames(state_means_df) <- c("State", "Mean_H3K4me3", "Mean_H3K27ac", "Mean_H3K36me3")
state_means_df$State <- paste("State", state_means_df$State)

print(state_means_df)

# ---------- 5) 合并所有表格 -> Final summary ----------
message("\n--- 5. Final summary table ---")

final_summary <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "State", all = TRUE),
                        list(enrichment_comparison, coverage_results, state_means_df))

# 保持 State1..State4 顺序
final_summary$State <- factor(final_summary$State, levels = paste("State", 1:4))
final_summary <- final_summary[order(final_summary$State), ]
final_summary$State <- as.character(final_summary$State)

print(final_summary)

# ---------- 6) 写入 CSV ----------
write.csv(final_summary, "Final_Project_Summary_Metrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)
message("\n✅ Updated summary saved to: Final_Project_Summary_Metrics.csv")



# ==========================================
# Table 1 (High-score version): State summary
# Add: coverage bp, segment stats, self-transition prob, top mark
# ==========================================

# ---------- A) 基础表：enrichment（你已有） ----------
enrichment_comparison <- data.frame(
  State = paste("State", 1:4),
  TSS_Enrichment      = round(enrichment_scores, 2),
  CpG_Enrichment      = round(enrichment_cpg, 2),
  GeneBody_Enrichment = round(enrichment_gene_body, 2)
)

# ---------- B) 覆盖率：bins 数、bp 数、百分比 ----------
state_counts <- table(state_labels)
state_counts <- state_counts[as.character(1:4)]
state_counts[is.na(state_counts)] <- 0

coverage_bins <- as.numeric(state_counts)
coverage_bp <- coverage_bins * bin_size
coverage_pct <- round(coverage_bins / sum(coverage_bins) * 100, 2)

coverage_results <- data.frame(
  State = paste("State", 1:4),
  Coverage_Bins = coverage_bins,
  Coverage_bp   = coverage_bp,
  Coverage_Mb   = round(coverage_bp / 1e6, 3),
  Coverage_Pct  = coverage_pct
)

# ---------- C) Emission means（从数据直接算，更稳） ----------
state_means_df <- aggregate(df_hmm, by = list(State = state_labels), FUN = mean)
state_means_df$State <- as.character(state_means_df$State)
all_states <- data.frame(State = as.character(1:4))
state_means_df <- merge(all_states, state_means_df, by = "State", all.x = TRUE)

state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")] <- round(
  state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")], 2
)

# Top mark（便于解释）
get_top_mark <- function(row) {
  vals <- c(row["H3K4me3"], row["H3K27ac"], row["H3K36me3"])
  names(vals)[which.max(vals)]
}
top_mark <- apply(state_means_df[, c("H3K4me3","H3K27ac","H3K36me3")], 1, get_top_mark)

state_means_df_out <- data.frame(
  State = paste("State", state_means_df$State),
  Mean_H3K4me3  = state_means_df$H3K4me3,
  Mean_H3K27ac  = state_means_df$H3K27ac,
  Mean_H3K36me3 = state_means_df$H3K36me3,
  TopMark = top_mark
)

# ---------- D) 片段统计：rle 得到每段长度 ----------
run <- rle(state_labels)

seg_df <- data.frame(
  state = as.character(run$values),
  len_bins = run$lengths
)

# 每个 state：段数、段长统计
seg_stats <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:4, function(k) {
  x <- seg_df$len_bins[seg_df$state == as.character(k)]
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(
      State = paste("State", k),
      Num_Segments = 0,
      Median_Segment_Length_Bins = NA,
      Mean_Segment_Length_Bins   = NA,
      Median_Segment_Length_bp   = NA,
      Mean_Segment_Length_bp     = NA
    ))
  }
  data.frame(
    State = paste("State", k),
    Num_Segments = length(x),
    Median_Segment_Length_Bins = median(x),
    Mean_Segment_Length_Bins   = round(mean(x), 2),
    Median_Segment_Length_bp   = median(x) * bin_size,
    Mean_Segment_Length_bp     = round(mean(x) * bin_size, 2)
  )
}))

# ---------- E) Self-transition（从 Viterbi 路径计算经验转移概率） ----------
K <- 4
z <- as.integer(state_labels)

# 经验转移计数
trans_counts <- matrix(0, nrow = K, ncol = K,
                       dimnames = list(paste0("State", 1:K), paste0("State", 1:K)))

for (t in 2:length(z)) {
  trans_counts[z[t-1], z[t]] <- trans_counts[z[t-1], z[t]] + 1
}

# 行归一化得到经验转移概率矩阵
trans_prob <- prop.table(trans_counts, margin = 1)

# self-transition = 对角线（状态保持概率）
self_trans <- diag(trans_prob)

self_trans_df <- data.frame(
  State = paste("State", 1:K),
  SelfTransition = round(self_trans, 3)
)

# （可选）如果你也想把整个转移矩阵保存下来：
write.csv(round(trans_prob, 4), "Empirical_TransitionMatrix_Viterbi.csv")
# ---------- F) 合并成 Table 1 ----------
table1 <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "State", all = TRUE),
                 list(enrichment_comparison, coverage_results, seg_stats, self_trans_df, state_means_df_out))

# 排序
table1$State <- factor(table1$State, levels = paste("State", 1:4))
table1 <- table1[order(table1$State), ]
table1$State <- as.character(table1$State)

print(table1)

# 写出 Table 1
write.csv(table1, "Table1_State_Summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
message("✅ Table 1 saved to: Table1_State_Summary.csv")
```



```{r}
# ==========================================
# 10. (终极版) 模型选择 + 稳定性诊断
# 输出：AIC, BIC, LogLik, Avg_Seg_Len, Min_State_Cov
# 修复：自动对齐列数，避免 rbind 报错
# 图表：4合1 拼图 (蓝线红点风格)
# ==========================================

library(depmixS4)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra) # 用于拼图

# --------- 0) 参数设置 ---------
set.seed(123)

subset_n   <- 5000       # 使用前 5k bins 加速 (正式跑可设为 nrow(df_hmm))
n_restart  <- 10            # 每个 K 随机重启 10 次防局部最优
k_values   <- 2:8           # 测试 K=2 到 K=8 (通常 8 足够看到拐点)

# 截取数据子集
df_subset <- df_hmm[1:min(subset_n, nrow(df_hmm)), , drop = FALSE]

message(paste0("Running Model Selection on first ", nrow(df_subset), " bins..."))

# --------- 1) 辅助函数：提取关键指标 ---------
get_metrics <- function(fit_obj, df_len) {
  # A. 基础模型指标
  ll  <- as.numeric(logLik(fit_obj))
  aic <- AIC(fit_obj)
  bic <- BIC(fit_obj)
  
  # B. 解码状态 (Viterbi)
  post_probs <- posterior(fit_obj)
  z <- post_probs$state
  
  # C. 计算 Coverage (占比)
  # 技巧：用 table 计算后转为百分比，取最小值作为"最稀有状态"
  tab <- table(z)
  cov_pcts <- as.numeric(tab) / df_len * 100
  min_cov  <- min(cov_pcts) # 这里的最小值决定了是否有"废状态"
  
  # D. 计算 Stability (段长)
  runs <- rle(z)
  avg_len <- mean(runs$lengths) # 平均段长 (bins)
  
  return(list(LogLik=ll, AIC=aic, BIC=bic, Avg_Seg_Len=avg_len, Min_State_Cov=min_cov))
}

# --------- 2) 主循环 (K=2..8) ---------
results_list <- list()

for (k in k_values) {
  message(paste0("--- Testing K = ", k, " (", n_restart, " restarts) ---"))
  
  best_fit <- NULL
  best_ll  <- -Inf
  best_metrics <- NULL
  
  # Restart 循环
  for (r in 1:n_restart) {
    set.seed(1000 + k*100 + r) # 确保随机性
    
    # 构造模型
    mod_tmp <- depmix(
      list(H3K4me3 ~ 1, H3K27ac ~ 1, H3K36me3 ~ 1),
      data = df_subset,
      nstates = k,
      family = list(gaussian(), gaussian(), gaussian())
    )
    
    # 拟合 (tryCatch 防止极个别不收敛报错)
    fit_tmp <- tryCatch({
      fit(mod_tmp, verbose = FALSE)
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    
    if (!is.null(fit_tmp)) {
      ll_current <- logLik(fit_tmp)
      
      # 寻找当前 K 下的最佳 LogLik
      if (ll_current > best_ll) {
        best_ll  <- ll_current
        best_fit <- fit_tmp
      }
    }
  }
  
  # 获取最佳模型指标
  if (!is.null(best_fit)) {
    m <- get_metrics(best_fit, nrow(df_subset))
    
    # 存入 data.frame
    results_list[[as.character(k)]] <- data.frame(
      K = k,
      Best_LogLik = m$LogLik,
      AIC = m$AIC,
      BIC = m$BIC,
      Avg_Segment_Length = m$Avg_Seg_Len,
      Min_State_Coverage = m$Min_State_Cov # 关键指标：最少那个状态占了多少%
    )
  }
}

# 汇总为大表格
model_select_table <- do.call(rbind, results_list)

# 保存 CSV
write.csv(model_select_table, "Final_Model_Selection_Summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
print(model_select_table)

# --------- 3) 论文级 4-Panel 可视化 (蓝线红点) ---------

# 通用绘图主题设置
my_theme <- theme_bw() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10))

# 图 A: AIC
p1 <- ggplot(model_select_table, aes(x = K, y = AIC)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "red", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "A. Model Fit (AIC)", y = "AIC Score", x = NULL) + # x轴留空给下方图
  my_theme

# 图 B: BIC
p2 <- ggplot(model_select_table, aes(x = K, y = BIC)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "red", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "B. Model Fit (BIC)", y = "BIC Score", x = NULL) +
  my_theme

# 图 C: Stability (平均段长)
p3 <- ggplot(model_select_table, aes(x = K, y = Avg_Segment_Length)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "red", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "C. Stability: Avg Segment Length", y = "Length (bins)", x = "Number of States (K)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = k_values) +
  my_theme

# 图 D: Redundancy (最小状态覆盖率)
p4 <- ggplot(model_select_table, aes(x = K, y = Min_State_Coverage)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +    # 保持一致风格用线图，也可以用柱状图
  geom_point(color = "red", size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray") + # 1% 阈值线
  annotate("text", x = max(k_values), y = 1.5, label = "1% Threshold", color = "darkgray", size=3) +
  labs(title = "D. Redundancy: Min State Size", y = "Min Coverage (%)", x = "Number of States (K)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = k_values) +
  my_theme

# 组合拼图 (2x2)
final_plot <- grid.arrange(p1, p2, p3, p4, ncol = 2)

# 保存图片
ggsave("Figure_S1_Model_Selection_Dashboard.pdf", final_plot, width = 8, height = 6)

message("\n✅ 运行完成！")
message("1. 汇总表格已保存: Final_Model_Selection_Summary.csv")
message("2. 拼图已保存: Figure_S1_Model_Selection_Dashboard.png")
```

```{r}
library(pheatmap)
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(svglite)

# ------------------------------------------------
# B. 高级热图 (Clustered Heatmap)
# ------------------------------------------------
message("\n--- B. Generating Advanced Heatmap ---")

state_means_final <- aggregate(df_hmm, by = list(State = state_labels), FUN = mean)
rownames(state_means_final) <- paste("State", state_means_final$State)
heatmap_mat <- as.matrix(state_means_final[, -1])

colnames(heatmap_mat) <- c("Promoter (H3K4me3)", "Enhancer (H3K27ac)", "Gene Body (H3K36me3)")

# pheatmap 返回的是一个对象（gtable），建议保存到变量，便于调试
ph <- pheatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  fontsize_number = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "mistyrose", "red", "darkred"))(100),
  main = "Emission Parameters: Clustered State Definition"
)

# ✅ 保存 pheatmap 到 PDF：用 pdf() 包住 + print(ph)
pdf("Emission_Parameters.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
print(ph)
dev.off()

# ------------------------------------------------
# C. Residual Analysis
# ------------------------------------------------
message("\n--- C. Residual Analysis ---")

# 1) 计算残差
pred_means <- state_means_final[match(state_labels, state_means_final$State), -1]
residuals <- X - as.matrix(pred_means)
colnames(residuals) <- c("Resid_H3K4me3", "Resid_H3K27ac", "Resid_H3K36me3")

# 2) melt（写清列名，避免提示）
resid_df <- reshape2::melt(
  as.data.frame(residuals),
  variable.name = "Mark",
  value.name = "Residual"
)

# 3) 画图（先创建 p_resid 再保存）
p_resid <- ggplot(resid_df, aes(x = Residual, fill = Mark)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-3, 3)) +   # ✅ 比 xlim() 更安全（不会丢数据导致奇怪问题）
  labs(
    title = "Model Diagnostics: Residual Distribution",
    subtitle = "Ideally centered at 0 (Gaussian-ish)",
    x = "Residual Value (Z-score)",
    y = "Density"
  )

print(p_resid)  # ✅ 让 knit 在文档里显示图

# 4) 保存 SVG（稳）
svglite("Residual_Distribution.svg", width = 10, height = 8)
print(p_resid)
dev.off()
```


副图：
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(GenomicRanges)

# ======================================================
# 1. 智能选取绘图区域 (解决“横线”问题)
# ======================================================

# 假设 X_raw 和 X (Z-score后) 已经在内存中
# 如果没有，请确保你已经运行了之前的读取和标准化代码

# 1. 计算总活性 (三个标记之和)，找到信号最强的那个 bin
total_signal <- rowSums(X_raw)
peak_center  <- which.max(total_signal)

# 2. 设定一个超大窗口：前后各 25000 bins (即 5Mb + 5Mb = 10Mb 区域)
# 这样肯定能看到波峰波谷，不会只有一条线
window_size <- 25000 
start_idx   <- max(1, peak_center - window_size)
end_idx     <- min(nrow(X_raw), peak_center + window_size)
subset_idx  <- start_idx:end_idx

message(paste("Selected Region Indices:", start_idx, "to", end_idx))
message(paste("Region Width:", (end_idx - start_idx) * 200 / 1e6, "Mb"))

# ======================================================
# 2. 准备数据 DataFrame
# ======================================================

# --- A. 原始数据 (Raw) ---
df_raw <- as.data.frame(X_raw[subset_idx, ])
df_raw$position <- start(bins)[subset_idx]
df_raw_long <- melt(df_raw, id.vars = "position", 
                    variable.name = "Mark", value.name = "Signal")

# --- B. 处理后数据 (Log1p + Z-score) ---
# 注意：X 是你的标准化矩阵 (X <- scale(log1p(X_raw)))
df_norm <- as.data.frame(X[subset_idx, ])
df_norm$position <- start(bins)[subset_idx]
df_norm_long <- melt(df_norm, id.vars = "position", 
                     variable.name = "Mark", value.name = "Signal")

# ======================================================
# 3. 独立绘图与保存 (Visualizations)
# ======================================================

# --- 图 1: 原始数据轨迹 (Raw Data Track) ---
p_track_raw <- ggplot(df_raw_long, aes(x = position/1e6, y = Signal, color = Mark)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.3) + # 线条细一点，避免密集区域糊成一团
  # 关键：Raw数据必须用 free_y，因为H3K4me3可能有几百，其他只有几十
  facet_grid(Mark ~ ., scales = "free_y") +  
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title = "Raw Data Tracks (High Activity Region)", 
       subtitle = "Note: Different Y-axis scales (Extreme Peaks visible)",
       y = "Raw Signal Value", 
       x = "Genomic Position (Mb)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") # 原始数据分面了，不需要图例

print(p_track_raw)
ggsave("Viz_1_Raw_Tracks.pdf", p_track_raw, width = 12, height = 6)


# --- 图 2: 标准化数据轨迹 (Z-score Track) ---
p_track_norm <- ggplot(df_norm_long, aes(x = position/1e6, y = Signal, color = Mark)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.3) +
  # 关键：Z-score 后量纲统一，不需要 free_y，可以直接对比谁强谁弱
  facet_grid(Mark ~ .) +  
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title = "Normalized Data Tracks (Log1p + Z-score)", 
       subtitle = "Standardized to N(0,1) - Broad domains become visible",
       y = "Z-score", 
       x = "Genomic Position (Mb)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_track_norm)
ggsave("Viz_2_Norm_Tracks.pdf", p_track_norm, width = 12, height = 6)


# --- 图 3: 原始数据密度分布 (Raw Density) ---
# 为了看清分布，我们可以用更多的数据点，或者就用这段区域的
p_dist_raw <- ggplot(df_raw_long, aes(x = Signal, fill = Mark)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  # 截断X轴：原始数据长尾太严重，只看 0-50 范围，否则全是平的
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 50)) + 
  labs(title = "Distribution: Raw Data", 
       subtitle = "Highly skewed (Left-heavy), non-Gaussian",
       x = "Raw Signal Value", y = "Density")

print(p_dist_raw)
ggsave("Viz_3_Raw_Density.pdf", p_dist_raw, width = 8, height = 6)


# --- 图 4: 标准化数据密度分布 (Z-score Density) ---
p_dist_norm <- ggplot(df_norm_long, aes(x = Signal, fill = Mark)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  # 加一条标准正态分布虚线作为参考
  stat_function(fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = 0, sd = 1), 
                linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution: Log1p + Z-score", 
       subtitle = "Approximates Gaussian (ready for HMM)",
       x = "Z-score", y = "Density")

print(p_dist_norm)
ggsave("Viz_4_Norm_Density.pdf", p_dist_norm, width = 8, height = 6)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(corrplot) 
library(gridExtra)

# ========================================================
# 参数设置
# ========================================================
K <- 4  # ✅ 修改：根据您的要求，设置状态数为 4
z <- as.integer(state_labels) # 获取状态序列 (确保 state_labels 已在环境中)

# ========================================================
# Supp 1. 经验转移矩阵 (Empirical Transition Matrix)
# ========================================================
# 统计 Viterbi 路径中 1->1, 1->2 等跳转次数

# 1. 统计跳转次数
trans_mat <- matrix(0, nrow=K, ncol=K)
rownames(trans_mat) <- colnames(trans_mat) <- paste("State", 1:K)

for(i in 1:(length(z)-1)){
  from <- z[i]
  to   <- z[i+1]
  trans_mat[from, to] <- trans_mat[from, to] + 1
}

# 2. 归一化 (让每一行加起来等于 1，即计算概率)
trans_prob <- trans_mat / rowSums(trans_mat)

# 3. 画热图并保存
pdf("Supp_Transition_Matrix.pdf", width=7, height=6)
corrplot(trans_prob, is.corr = FALSE, method = "color", 
         addCoef.col = "black", # 显示具体数值
         tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, 
         col = colorRampPalette(c("white", "lightblue", "blue"))(100),
         title = "Empirical Transition Probabilities", mar=c(0,0,2,0))
dev.off()
message("✅ Supp 1: Transition Matrix saved.")


# ========================================================
# Supp 2. 状态片段长度分布 (Segment Length Distribution)
# ========================================================

# 1. 计算每个片段的长度
runs <- rle(as.integer(state_labels))
df_seg <- data.frame(
  State = factor(paste("State", runs$values), levels = paste("State", 1:K)),
  Length_Bin = runs$lengths,
  Length_bp = runs$lengths * 200 # 假设 bin_size = 200bp
)

# 2. 绘图 (使用 Log10 x轴)
# 注意：这里需要您之前定义好的 state_colors (应包含 State 1 到 State 4 的颜色)
p_seg_dist <- ggplot(df_seg, aes(x = Length_bp, fill = State)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) + # Log轴展示数量级差异
  scale_fill_manual(values = state_colors) + # 使用您之前定义的颜色
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Supplementary: Genomic Segment Length Distribution",
       subtitle = "Distribution of chromatin state domain sizes",
       x = "Segment Length (bp, log scale)", 
       y = "Density") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Supp_Segment_Length.pdf", p_seg_dist, width=8, height=6)
message("✅ Supp 2: Segment Length Distribution saved.")


# ========================================================
# Supp 3. 原始标记相关性 (Input Correlation) - ✅ 已适配3个文件
# ========================================================

# 1. 检查输入矩阵 X 是否存在
if (!exists("X")) {
  stop("错误：环境中找不到矩阵 X。请先运行之前的 Log+Z-score 标准化代码生成 X。")
}

# 2. 计算相关矩阵 (Pearson)
cor_mat <- cor(X) 

# 3. ✅ 关键修改：只设置 3 个标记的名称，顺序必须对应 cbind 时的顺序
mark_names <- c("H3K4me3", "H3K27ac", "H3K36me3")

# 简单检查列数是否匹配
if(ncol(cor_mat) != 3) {
  warning(paste("注意：矩阵 X 的列数是", ncol(cor_mat), "，但我们只准备了 3 个名字。请检查 X 是否包含多余数据。"))
  # 如果不匹配，尝试直接使用 X 原有的列名
  if(!is.null(colnames(X))) {
    colnames(cor_mat) <- rownames(cor_mat) <- colnames(X)
  }
} else {
  colnames(cor_mat) <- rownames(cor_mat) <- mark_names
}

# 4. 画图并保存
pdf("Supp_Data_Correlation.pdf", width=6, height=6)
corrplot(cor_mat, method = "ellipse", type = "upper", 
         addCoef.col = "black", 
         tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45,
         title = "Correlation of Histone Marks (Input Data)", mar=c(0,0,2,0))
dev.off()
message("✅ Supp 3: Correlation Plot saved.")
```







```{r}
library(rtracklayer)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(depmixS4)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(gridExtra)

# --- (A) 准备文件列表 (新增 H3K9me3) ---
bw_files <- list(
  "H3K4me3"  = "data/H3K4me3.BigWig",
  "H3K27ac"  = "data/H3K27ac.BigWig",
  "H3K36me3" = "data/H3K36me3.BigWig",
  "H3K9me3"  = "data/H3K9me3.BigWig"  # <--- 新增的 Repressed Control
)

# --- (B) 你的 get_binned_signal 函数 (保持不变，省略不写) ---
# ... (这里沿用你之前的 get_binned_signal 函数) ...

# --- (C) 读取并标准化 ---
message("Processing 4 marks (including H3K9me3)...")
signal_list <- lapply(bw_files, get_binned_signal, bins = bins)

# 拼接矩阵 (N x 4)
X_raw <- do.call(cbind, signal_list)

# Log + Z-score (标准化非常重要，让 H3K9me3 和 H3K4me3 有可比性)
X_log <- log1p(X_raw)
X <- scale(X_log)

# 检查一下维度，应该是 N x 4
print(head(X))


# ==========================================
# 2. HMM Fitting with Multiple Restarts
# ==========================================

# 准备数据框
df_hmm <- as.data.frame(X)
# 列名现在是：H3K4me3, H3K27ac, H3K36me3, H3K9me3

# 设定状态数 (建议尝试 K=5，给 H3K9me3 一个独立状态)
K <- 5 
n_restarts <- 5  # 跑 5 次，取最好 (你要求的 multiple starts)

message(paste0("Fitting HMM (K=", K, ") with ", n_restarts, " random starts..."))

best_fit_mod <- NULL
best_loglik  <- -Inf

for (i in 1:n_restarts) {
  
  # 打印进度
  message(paste("  >> Run", i, "/", n_restarts, "..."))
  
  # 1. 设定随机种子 (确保每次起点不同)
  set.seed(100 + i)
  
  # 2. 定义模型 (注意：family 列表现在需要 4 个 gaussian)
  mod_tmp <- depmix(
    list(H3K4me3 ~ 1, H3K27ac ~ 1, H3K36me3 ~ 1, H3K9me3 ~ 1), 
    data = df_hmm, 
    nstates = K, 
    family = list(gaussian(), gaussian(), gaussian(), gaussian()) 
  )
  
  # 3. 拟合 (使用 tryCatch 防止个别随机起点导致不收敛报错)
  fit_tmp <- tryCatch({
    fit(mod_tmp, verbose = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("     Converge failed for this run, skipping.")
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # 4. 比较 LogLik，保留最好的
  if (!is.null(fit_tmp)) {
    current_ll <- logLik(fit_tmp)
    message(paste("     LogLik:", round(current_ll, 2)))
    
    if (current_ll > best_loglik) {
      best_loglik  <- current_ll
      best_fit_mod <- fit_tmp
      message("     --> New Best Model found!")
    }
  }
}

message("------------------------------------------------")
message(paste("✅ Final Model Selected. Best LogLik:", round(best_loglik, 2)))
print(summary(best_fit_mod))

# 提取最终状态
final_probs <- posterior(best_fit_mod)
state_labels <- final_probs$state

# 把状态贴回 bins
mcols(bins) <- cbind(mcols(bins), as.data.frame(X), state = factor(state_labels))

# ==========================================
# 3. 检查发射矩阵 (Emission Heatmap)
# ==========================================

# 计算每个状态的均值
state_means <- aggregate(df_hmm, by=list(State=state_labels), FUN=mean)
rownames(state_means) <- state_means$State
state_means_mat <- as.matrix(state_means[,-1])

# 打印数值矩阵，让你心里有数
print("Emission Means (Z-score):")
print(round(state_means_mat, 2))

# 绘图
# 注意：Colv=NA 保证列的顺序不乱，方便你通过列名看对应关系
heatmap(state_means_mat, Rowv = NA, Colv = NA, scale="none", 
        main=paste("Emission Matrix (K=", K, ")"),
        col=colorRampPalette(c("white", "pink", "red", "darkred"))(50))


```
